rationale: No events this cycle directly or significantly affect Portugal; Iran deal uncertainty continues as background energy price factor.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: conflicting signals on Sunday signing
top_events.summary: Unresolved Iran deal keeps global energy prices uncertain, with indirect effects on Portuguese household energy bills and tourism-dependent economy. No resolution yet.

top_events.title: Switzerland votes on population cap referendum
top_events.summary: A Swiss vote to cap population at 10 million could affect EU labor mobility norms indirectly, but has minimal near-term impact on Portugal.
